name: Apple or Green Tomato Chutney
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces chopped crystallized ginger OR 3/4 cup fresh ginger
2 chopped red peppers, seeds and membranes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the fruit is tender.
3. Pack the chutney into sterilized jars and seal.
4. Optionally, add 1 cup chopped onions and 1 cup chopped nuts if desired.
5. Makes about 1 1/2 quarts.
